summary: Phase A+B features testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified: Dashboard 5 KPI cards with icons inside boxes, Market Mode full POS workflow (session start, product buttons, CASH/EFTPOS payment, transaction log with timestamps, session end), Weekly Control MM/DD/YY date format with day names, Historical page no future dates sorted oldest-to-latest, Supplier Directory 3 view modes with email mailto links, Staff Performance dropdown filter, Auto-Reorder PO print/edit buttons, Inventory Tracker clickable COGS flow badges, Login register Admin/User roles.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Market Mode implementation is complete with full POS workflow: session management, product selection, payment processing, transaction logging with timestamps, and auto-backup on session end
Historical endpoint correctly filters out future dates using today's date comparison
Weekly Control dates formatted correctly as MM/DD/YY (DayName) e.g., '02/15/26 (Sunday)'
COGS flow badges in Inventory Tracker are properly wrapped in Link components for navigation
Login register form correctly shows Admin/User instead of Owner/Staff
seed_data_creation: Created test supplier via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A+B features fully tested and working. Key features: (1) Market Mode - full POS counter with session management, product buttons, CASH/EFTPOS payment, transaction log with timestamps, auto-backup on session end. (2) Dashboard - 5 KPI cards with icons inside boxes beside labels, Net Profit card present. (3) Weekly Control - dates in MM/DD/YY (DayName) format. (4) Historical - no future dates, sorted oldest to latest. (5) Supplier Directory - 3 view modes (tile/grid/list), email mailto links. (6) Staff Performance - dropdown filter for per-staff filtering. (7) Auto-Reorder - PO print and edit buttons. (8) Inventory Tracker - clickable COGS flow badges linking to correct pages. (9) Login - register form shows Admin/User roles. All backend Market Mode endpoints working: POST /api/market-mode/sessions, POST /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction, POST /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/end.
